programme.title: Double Target
programme.desc: After several American and British military personnel are killed in suicide attacks throughout Southeast Asia, the U.S. begins to suspect a plot by the Vietnam government. While his military commanders want to see the commando succeed in his mission, his political overseers have a different set of plans.
